Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.asm

package dev.morphia.critter.parser.asm
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dev.morphia.critter.parser
     
    dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo
     
    dev.morphia.critter.parser.java
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddFieldAccessorMethods
    Generates synthetic __readXxx and __writeXxx accessor methods directly into an entity class bytecode for each of its fields.
    AddMethodAccessorMethods
    Generates synthetic __readXxx and __writeXxx accessor methods into an entity class bytecode for properties backed by getter/setter methods rather than direct fields.
    BaseGenerator
    Base class for ASM-based bytecode generators used by Critter to produce accessor and model classes.
